catalogRefs.parent_job_id: spa-only-presets.json → cinema_studio_3_5_video_edit (must be completed cinematic_studio_video_3_5 job in same account)
catalogRefs.target_artifact_id: spa-only-presets.json → cinema_studio_3_5_video_edit (SPA-generated artifact uuid tied to that parent)

bestPracticeHint: Requires prior cinematic_studio_video_3_5 completion. target_artifact_id is NOT the job_id/job_set_id — it is a separate SPA-emitted uuid.
sourceOfPreset: Complete cinematic_studio_video_3_5 in SPA → open the result → click "edit" or scene divider → capture target_artifact_id from POST body.
